description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a low-pitched, multi-sectioned roof covered in dark gray shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a smooth, light-colored material, likely stucco or painted concrete, with accent features in wood paneling near the entrance. The front facade includes a prominent garage door, a main entrance with a covered porch, and large windows that allow ample natural light. The property is enclosed by a perimeter wall, with a green lawn area visible on one side and a paved driveway leading to the garage. The roofline features a central raised section, possibly for ventilation or skylighting, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and functional outdoor spaces. The rear and side elevations show additional windows and a partially covered patio area, enhancing the indoor-outdoor living experience.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a low-pitched, multi-sectioned roof, light exterior walls, wood accents, and a prominent garage. The property is enclosed with a green lawn and features large windows and a covered porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wood accent panel, garage door, and a section of green lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long stretch of wall, multiple windows, and the expanse of the green lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, additional windows, and the covered patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the green lawn, side windows, and the rear section of the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
